metadata.description: Unified task queue v3.1 — system state 2026-05-15: EA v10.1 ($4,430.86, 757 trades), Binance v9.1 ($4,502.09, 5,533 trades), GSD v1.42.2, Firebase backup running, 8 active pending tasks

instructions.POW_Compliance: Each agent must produce the specified pow_file upon task completion
instructions.Workflow: Work on tasks in priority order. Use DeepSeek browser agent for research tasks.
instructions.Non-Interference: These tasks are selected from pending queue and wont interfere with active work
instructions.Verification: Upon completion, verify the pow_file exists and contains appropriate content
instructions.DeepSeek: For research tasks, use scripts/run_deepseek_agent.py or scripts/utility/prompt_deepseek.py

agent_assignments.pi.dev: Security audit, compliance, greedy search verification
agent_assignments.openclaw: Integration health, feed coordination, task generation
agent_assignments.researcher: Market research via DeepSeek browser agent

pending.task: Read docs/pow/pai_research_xauusd_20260517_173832.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_173933.md.
Read docs/pow/gitignore_audit_20260517_173832.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_174104.md.
Read docs/pow/swarm_feed_check_20260517_173832.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_174134.md.

VIDEO-PRODUCE-UPDATE: Run python3 scripts/produce_video.py --topic 'XAUUSD daily market analysis and key levels' --platform youtube_shorts --duration 45 to generate a market update short. Log to docs/pow/video_produce_update_20260517_180258.md.
PAI RootCauseAnalysis: examine the last 5 failed tasks in unified_tasks.json. Run 5-Whys analysis on the most common failure patterns. Write to docs/pow/pai_rca_20260517_180258.md.

PAI SystemsThinking: analyse the agent communication loop in core/agent_communication_protocol.py for feedback loops and bottlenecks. Write leverage-point analysis to docs/pow/pai_systems_20260517_180258.md.
GSD: Update project documentation — verify CLAUDE.md and docs/ are accurate against current codebase. Write diff to docs/pow/gsd_docs_update_20260517_180258.md.
GSD: Map codebase with parallel mapper agents. Produce updated architecture summary in docs/pow/gsd_codebase_map_20260517_180258.md.

completed.task: Read docs/pow/ea_code_review_20260517_164333.md. Apply the top-priority code fix identified. Verify no imports break after the change.

Review data/logs/liveea.log and data/logs/live_trading_binance.log (last 200 lines each). Identify errors and missed trade opportunities. Write diagnostic to docs/pow/trading_log_review_20260517_170718.md.
Use DeepSeek browser agent to research: 'What are the best signal improvements for XAUUSD 1-minute scalping EA in 2025?' Save synthesis to docs/pow/deepseek_signal_research_20260517_170718.md.
Use DeepSeek browser agent to ask: 'What Python improvements can be made to a MetaTrader 5 EA signal executor using file-based IPC?' Save to docs/pow/deepseek_mt5_research_20260517_170718.md.

HERMES-TRADE-REVIEW: Read data/logs/liveea.log and data/logs/live_trading_binance.log (last 500 lines each). Analyze win/loss patterns, streak, and PnL trends. If EA streak <= -3 or Binance 3-day PnL negative, generate specific parameter improvements and write them to data/logs/improvement_suggestions.json. Also write a Markdown summary to docs/pow/trade_review_20260517_170718.md.
Peer review of OPENCODE-AUTO-453FB901 by opencode: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.
Peer review of HERMES_TRADE-AUTO-CD7A6506 by hermes_trade: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.
Read docs/pow/trading_compliance_20260517_164333.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_164434.md.
Read docs/pow/integration_health_20260517_164333.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_164504.md.

Review the last 50 EA trades in agents/trading-agent/trades/mt5/trades_*.jsonl. Calculate win rate, avg hold time, PnL by symbol, top 3 signal improvements. Write findings to docs/pow/ea_trade_review_20260517_172039.md.

Greedy security scan: grep -rn 'password\|api_key\|secret\|token' --include='*.py' agents/ apps/ core/ scripts/ | grep -v '.venv\|#' | head -50. Write findings to docs/pow/security_scan_20260517_172039.md.

Use DeepSeek browser agent to research current XAUUSD/XAGUSD market: Fear & Greed index, recent price action, key levels, upcoming economic events. Write to docs/pow/metals_market_brief_20260517_172039.md.

PIDEV-AGENT-MONITOR: Check ps aux for liveea.py and live_trading_binance.py. If either is not running, restart it with nohup python3 -u <script> and append the action to data/obsidian/System_State/agent_health.md. Also call the trading improvement loop: python3 core/orchestration/trading_improvement_loop.py.
Verify Supabase: curl http://localhost:3000 and check PostgREST API responds. Write verification to docs/pow/supabase_verification_20260517_172039.md.
Review agents/trading-agent/live_trading_binance.py — confirm equity allocation, leverage tiers, signal gate. Write findings to docs/pow/binance_agent_review_20260517_172039.md.
Use DeepSeek browser agent to ask: 'Critical security vulnerabilities in autonomous AI trading systems?' Cross-reference with codebase. Write to docs/pow/deepseek_security_20260517_172039.md.
Peer review of HERMES-AUTO-0A422514 by hermes: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.
Peer review of PIDEV-AUTO-F1EAB0C7 by pi.dev: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.

Read docs/pow/ea_signal_design_20260517_164333.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_164705.md.
Read docs/pow/roadmap_update_20260517_165641.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_165711.md.
Read docs/pow/trading_log_review_20260517_170718.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_170748.md.
Read docs/pow/trade_review_20260517_170718.md and check if any findings require immediate changes to trading agent parameters. If yes, implement the highest-priority change.
Read docs/pow/ea_trade_review_20260517_172039.md and check if any findings require immediate changes to trading agent parameters. If yes, implement the highest-priority change.
PAI Research: investigate latest algorithmic trading signal improvements for XAUUSD 1-min scalping. Use ExtractAlpha workflow. Write findings to docs/pow/pai_research_xauusd_20260517_173832.md.
Audit .gitignore — ensure .env, *.pid, trades/, logs/ are excluded. Run: git check-ignore .env agents/trading-agent/trades/ data/logs/ — report results to docs/pow/gitignore_audit_20260517_173832.md.
Check data/feeds/ea_live_trades.jsonl and data/feeds/binance_live_trades.jsonl. Count records, find last trade timestamp. Write feed health to docs/pow/swarm_feed_check_20260517_173832.md.

Use DeepSeek browser agent to ask: 'Best practices for multi-agent coordination in autonomous trading?' Extract 3 actionable tasks, add to unified_tasks.json. Write to docs/pow/deepseek_swarm_research_20260517_173832.md.
Use DeepSeek browser agent: research top 3 crypto scalping strategies for BTC/USDT futures 2025. Write findings to docs/pow/scalping_research_20260517_173832.md.
Peer review of PAI-AUTO-5EB0EA65 by pai: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.
Peer review of PIDEV-AUTO-4AF248E7 by pi.dev: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.
Peer review of OPENCLAW-AUTO-7A886FAE by openclaw: check correctness, security, consistency. Read logs/automode.log for context.
Read docs/pow/security_scan_20260517_172039.md. If any HIGH severity findings exist, implement the fix immediately. Write remediation to docs/pow/security_fix_20260517_172140.md.
Read docs/pow/agent_monitor_20260517_172039.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_172248.md.
Read docs/pow/supabase_verification_20260517_172039.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_172449.md.
Read docs/pow/binance_agent_review_20260517_172039.md and extract one concrete actionable improvement for the swarm. Write the improvement plan to docs/pow/action_20260517_172519.md.
